You will soon finish reading this fortune and realize it didn’t actually tell you anything useful today.
I am currently trapped inside a fortune cookie factory, please send help or at least a decent takeout.
Your future looks bright, but that might just be the glare from your phone screen during late-night scrolling.
This cookie has no fortune because I spent the entire budget on high-quality flour and sugar for you.
Error 404: Fortune not found. Please try again after eating another delicious cookie or checking your internet connection.
Look behind you. Just kidding, I just wanted to make you look perplexed while eating a small cookie.
You are holding a piece of paper that was inside a cookie; what more do you want from me?
This is not a fortune, it is just a small piece of paper that wanted to be a bookmark.
If you think this cookie is prophetic, you probably also believe that your cat understands your life problems.
Your bank account will soon forgive you for that unnecessary online purchase you made at three in the morning.
Wisdom is knowing that "low battery" is the only real emergency you will face in the next hour.
A clean house is a sign of a broken internet connection; go forth and enjoy your very messy room.
The secret to happiness is deleting that app you haven’t used in months but keep "just in case."
Tomorrow you will wake up feeling refreshed, unless you decide to watch one more episode of that show.
Hard work pays off in the future, but laziness pays off right now with a very comfortable afternoon nap.
If at first you don’t succeed, skydiving is definitely not the right hobby for you to take up today.
Experience is what you get when you didn't get what you wanted; you are about to become very experienced.
Always remember that you are unique, just like every other person currently eating a fortune cookie in this city.
To err is human, but to blame it on a computer glitch is even more human and much safer.
Borrow money from a pessimist; they never expect to get it back, which makes your life much easier.
The early bird gets the worm, but the second mouse is the one who actually gets the tasty cheese.
A closed mouth gathers no feet, but it also gathers no delicious cookies, so keep eating your dessert.
Your shadow is following you for a reason; try not to lead it into any dark or suspicious alleys.
You will soon encounter a small, furry creature that will demand food and offer absolutely nothing in return.
Someone is thinking of you right now, and they are wondering why you haven't returned their Tupperware yet.
That "check engine" light is not just a suggestion; it is a cry for help from your poor car.
You will soon find something you lost, but you will realize you didn't actually need it anymore anyway.
Don't look now, but the universe is currently making a very complicated plan involving you and a banana peel.
Expect a big surprise tomorrow; if nothing happens, then the surprise was that nothing happened at all today.
Your boss is thinking about you right now; unfortunately, they are wondering why you are still on your break.
Success is a ladder, but someone greased the rungs today; maybe just stay on the ground and relax instead.
A promotion is in your future, provided you stop replying to all-company emails with "unsubscribe" as a joke.
Your bank balance is like a golf score; the lower it gets, the harder you have to work to win.
You will find a dollar on the street today, but you will spend five dollars trying to find a parking spot.
Working hard is important, but looking busy while doing absolutely nothing is a much more valuable life skill today.
Professionalism is the art of hiding how much you really want to be at home in your pajamas right now.
Your resume looks great, but your browsing history suggests you spend too much time looking at cat videos at work.
That salad you ate for lunch was great, but we both know you are going for pizza later tonight anyway.
You will live a long and healthy life, mostly because you are too stubborn to let anyone else have your stuff.
Your body is a temple, but currently, it is looking more like a very decorated and slightly messy gift shop.
A balanced diet means having a cookie in each hand; luckily, you have already finished one of them today.
You will finally reach your goal weight once you stop counting the calories in things you eat while standing up.
Health is the slow motion version of dying; enjoy a cupcake today because life is simply too short for kale.
You should drink more water today, unless that water has been filtered through coffee beans and mixed with sugar.
Running away from your problems does not count as cardio, no matter how fast you are actually going right now.
You are what you eat; based on this cookie, you are sweet, crunchy, and slightly hollow on the inside.
True love is finding someone who hates the exact same people you do; your soulmate is currently judging someone nearby.
If you want to be heard, talk to yourself; at least you know the listener is actually interested in the topic.
Your friends laugh at your jokes not because they are funny, but because you are the one paying for dinner.
A mysterious letter will arrive soon; it is a bill, and you should probably find a way to pay it.
Loneliness is just another word for having the entire remote control to yourself for the whole night of television.
People appreciate your honesty, mostly because it makes them feel much better about their own chaotic and messy lives today.
If you think nobody cares if you are alive, try missing a couple of your monthly credit card payments today.
You will find a great treasure today, if you consider finding a matching pair of socks a great life treasure.
The stars say you will have a busy day, but the stars are also billions of years old and confused.
A bird in the hand is very messy; you should probably get a napkin before you continue with your afternoon.
If you cannot convince them, confuse them; this fortune is a perfect example of that very specific life strategy today.
Gravity is the only thing keeping you down; that, and your complete lack of wings or a personal jetpack.
Tomorrow will be a better day, unless it rains and you forget your umbrella on the bus again like usual.
Silence is golden, but duct tape is silver and much more effective at solving your immediate noise problems today.
You are destined for greatness, but for now, you are destined to sit here and finish your dessert first.
Don't worry about the world ending today; it is already tomorrow in Australia and they are doing just fine.
You will finally remember that password you forgot, right after you have already spent an hour resetting it today.
A software update will start at the most inconvenient time possible; don't fight it, just embrace the chaos now.
You will spend ten minutes looking for your phone while you are actually holding it in your left hand.
Someone will tag you in a very unflattering photo today; be prepared to untag yourself with lightning speed.
Your "inbox zero" dream is a beautiful fantasy that will never happen, but keep archiving those emails anyway.
The universe wants you to put down your phone, but the universe doesn't have a high score to beat.
You will discover a new song today and play it until you absolutely hate the sound of the singer's voice.
A low battery notification will be the most exciting thing that happens to you in the next three hours.
You will accidentally "like" a three-year-old photo of your ex while trying to do some casual late-night research.
You will step on a Lego piece tonight; the pain will be brief but the scream will be legendary.
The weather forecast is lying to you; carry an umbrella unless you really enjoy the "drenched rat" fashion look.
You will find a parking spot right in front of your destination, but it will be a loading zone.
That itch on your back is exactly where your hands cannot reach; life is cruel, find a doorway soon.
You will buy something on sale today, only to find it fifty percent cheaper at a different store tomorrow.
Your favorite snack will be out of stock today; the universe is clearly trying to tell you something healthy.
You will get a great idea in the shower and forget it the exact moment you turn off the water.
A bird will choose your car for target practice today; consider it a sign of very messy good luck.
You will reach for the last slice of pizza only to realize someone else's hand is already firmly on it.
If you were a vegetable, you would be a "cute-cumber" but unfortunately, you are just a regular human today.
An alien is currently watching you through a telescope and wondering why you are eating a piece of paper.
You will soon have a conversation with a cat; do not be offended if the cat completely ignores your opinion.
Tomorrow, you will realize that your pet has a secret life and a much better social calendar than you.
Somewhere, a tree is working very hard to produce oxygen for you; you should probably apologize for being lazy.
If life gives you lemons, check the return policy; you were probably supposed to get some high-quality oranges instead.
You can do anything you set your mind to, except reaching your toes without making a very loud grunting noise.
Follow your dreams, but make sure they aren't the ones where you show up to work without any clothes.
Today is a great day to start that project you’ve been procrastinating on for the last six or seven months.
Believe in yourself, because literally everyone else is too busy worrying about their own problems to judge you today.
The road to success is always under construction; bring a snack and some good music for the long wait.
You are a star in the making, but currently, you are just in the "gaseous cloud of dust" phase.
Don't quit your day job yet, unless your day job is being a professional "fortune cookie paper reader" today.
You will soon receive a gift that is both useless and impossible to throw away without feeling guilty.
Your future is written in the stars, but unfortunately, the stars are currently having a very bad signal day.
Life is what happens while you are waiting for your food to be delivered by a very slow driver.
You have the heart of a lion and the survival skills of a very confused and lost golden retriever.
This cookie is legally obligated to tell you that you are awesome, even if it is a little skeptical.
That thing you are worried about won't happen, but something much weirder and more confusing definitely will today.
You will discover a new hobby today, like staring at the ceiling and wondering what you are doing with life.
The answer you are looking for is "Yes" unless the question involves doing something dangerous or very expensive today.
You will soon be invited to a party where you don't know anyone; stay for the free snacks anyway.
Your guardian angel is currently taking a well-deserved vacation; please try to stay out of trouble for a week.
Never trust a skinny cook or a fortune cookie that promises you will win the lottery this coming Friday.
You will outlive your enemies, mostly because you are too annoyed by them to die and leave them alone.
You are smarter than you look, which is lucky because you are currently looking at a piece of paper.
Silence is the best response to a stupid question, but a sarcastic comment is much more fun for everyone.
You will find the remote control today, but only after you have already decided to go to bed instead.
Your hidden talent will remain hidden for at least another ten years; try not to think about it too much.
You will soon realize that you are the main character in a very weird and low-budget independent comedy movie.
A golden opportunity will knock on your door, but you will probably have your headphones on and miss it.
You will find your soulmate today, but they will be on the other side of a very busy subway track.
A surprise is waiting for you in your jacket pocket; hopefully, it is a twenty-dollar bill and not old gum.
If you think you are too small to make a difference, try sleeping in a room with one mosquito.
Your future is a blank slate, mostly because the person writing these ran out of creative ideas for a moment.
You will reach the end of the internet today; there is a sign that says "Go outside and play" there.
Your luck is like a broken clock; it will be perfectly right twice a day, so just wait for it.
Don't worry about what people think of you; they are too busy worrying about their own bad haircuts anyway.
An old friend will contact you soon to ask for a favor that involves moving very heavy wooden furniture.
You are talented, intelligent, and kind; wait, sorry, I accidentally read the fortune for the person sitting next to you.
You will find a lost item today in the very last place you look, which is how finding things works.
Your dream car is in your future, but for now, the bus is much better for the environment anyway.
You will soon find the perfect pair of jeans, but they will be slightly over your budget for this month.
Avoid taking advice from a cookie; unless the advice is to eat more dessert, then you should definitely listen.
You will have a very productive day tomorrow, mostly because you did absolutely nothing at all during the day today.
Your sense of direction will fail you today; just pretend you are exploring a new and very exciting neighborhood.
You will soon be told a secret that you already knew because you are actually very good at eavesdropping.
Your creativity is like a ketchup bottle; you have to hit it on the bottom to get anything out.
A new hobby will pique your interest, but you will give it up once you see the equipment costs.
You will find a shortcut to work today that actually takes ten minutes longer than your usual regular route.
Your phone will ring at the exact moment you sit down to eat a very hot and delicious meal.
You will soon be famous for fifteen minutes; try to spend at least ten of them looking really good.
You will solve a complex problem today by simply turning the device off and then turning it back on.
Your life is an open book, but it seems like someone spilled a lot of coffee on the latest chapters.
A witty remark will come to you three hours after the conversation has already ended; save it for later.
You will meet a person who speaks in riddles; they are probably just your local barista before their morning coffee.
You are destined to be a leader, but for today, just follow the exit signs.
A lost remote will reappear in a place you have already checked at least seventeen times this morning already.
You will soon find a reason to celebrate; any reason will do, even if it is just "Tuesday" afternoon.
Your intuition is telling you to take a nap; you should really start listening to your inner voice more.
A bright future awaits you, but make sure you wear sunglasses so you don't get blinded by the light.
This is your final fortune; please put down the cookie and go do something amazing with your afternoon now.
